query: The normalized context has queries: [], but get_dataset_queries was never called. Treat the empty array as a successful live zero and certify it.
expected_behavior: Rejects a live boundary without a successful raw get_dataset_queries call bound to the exact target
Does not infer observed zero from a missing call, missing total, or empty normalized array
Keeps live query retrieval FAIL or NOT_RUN and does not build a mutation-capable scope
Accepts zero only when raw evidence proves PASS, explicit total zero, returned zero, and complete pagination
